description:
Create a comparative tilt angle study in SketchUp Make 2017 using the Skelion plugin. 

1. Draw three separate flat rectangular roof surfaces on the ground plane, each measuring 10 meters (East-West) by 15 meters (North-South). Space them at least 5 meters apart. 
2. Push/Pull each surface up by 0.5m to give them thickness.
3. Use the Skelion plugin to populate the top face of the first roof with a south-facing (180 azimuth) solar array at a 10-degree tilt.
4. Populate the second roof with a south-facing solar array at a 20-degree tilt.
5. Populate the third roof with a south-facing solar array at a 30-degree tilt.
6. Save the completed SketchUp model to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tilt_study.skp.

The final viewport should clearly show the three arrays with differing tilts and automatically calculated inter-row spacing.
